flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at McMurry University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.4k → $32.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at McMurry University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.4k → $32.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at McMurry University rose 58% between 2021 and 2024 (20.2% → 32.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at McMurry University rose 43% between 2021 and 2024 (31.0% → 44.3%).
